action.reasoning: Observation: Resumed training degraded performance because cosine LR restarted and best_val was reset to 0. Val acc went from 0.7258 to 0.7045. Analysis: Need to train from scratch with proper schedule for more epochs. 10 epochs = ~50 min. Decision: Train 10 epochs from scratch with improved augmentation and proper LR schedule, then submit eval.
